title: managementState
description: Management state of device in Microsoft Intune.

values.description: A retire command is occuring on the device and in the process of unenrolling from management
values.name: retirePending

values.description: Retire command failed on the device
values.name: retireFailed

values.description: A wipe command is occuring on the device and in the process of unenrolling from management
values.name: wipePending

values.description: Wipe command failed on the device
values.name: wipeFailed

values.description: A delete command is occuring on the device
values.name: deletePending

values.description: A retire command was issued for the device
values.name: retireIssued

values.description: A wipe command was issued for the device
values.name: wipeIssued

values.description: A wipe command for this device has been canceled
values.name: wipeCanceled

values.description: A retire command for this device has been canceled
values.name: retireCanceled

values.description: The device is discovered but not fully enrolled.
values.name: discovered

values.description: Evolvable enumeration sentinel value. Do not use.
values.name: unknownFutureValue
